creator: Cy.Schubert@komquats.com
text:
Here is what should be committed. Do you want to give it a try?

Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/pcvs/ports/sysutils/screen/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.77
diff -u -r1.77 Makefile
--- Makefile	23 Feb 2009 21:48:34 -0000	1.77
+++ Makefile	18 Mar 2009 19:25:53 -0000
@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	screen
 PORTVERSION=	4.0.3
-PORTREVISION=	6
+PORTREVISION=	7
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.uni-erlangen.de/pub/utilities/screen/ \
 		http://komquats.com/distfiles/ \
@@ -31,6 +31,10 @@
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
+CONFIGURE_ENV=  CFLAGS=-I${LOCALBASE}/include CPPFLAGS=-I${LOCALBASE}/inclu
de LDFLAGS=-L${LOCALBASE}/lib
+CFLAGS+=        -I${LOCALBASE}/include
+CPPFLAGS+=      -I${LOCALBASE}/include
+LDFLAGS+=       -L${LOCALBASE}/lib
 .if defined(WITH_MAN)
 MAN1=		screen.1
 MAKE_ARGS+=	-DWITH_MAN

+-#ifndef UTMP_HELPER

+-#endif
+ 
+ 
+ # if defined(GETUTENT) && (!defined(SVR4) || defined(__hpux))
+@@ -726,9 +724,12 @@

  int pid;
  {
@@ -14,4 +24,3 @@
